concept: Imagine a turn-based strategy game where I command an army of mechanical toys waging war across a child's bedroom at night. Different toys have unique abilities - wind-up soldiers march in straight lines, rubber duckies bounce over obstacles, toy planes perform reconnaissance, and teddy bears serve as heavy tanks. The battlefield constantly changes as the child rearranges furniture and toys during the day, requiring new strategies each night. The ultimate goal is to defeat the monsters hiding under the bed and in the closet before the child loses faith in their toy protectors.
